segments.text: Jai Shila Prabhupada, Hare Krishna Nama Prabhu ki Jai and welcome all of you for the 63rd
session of Soulful Japa. So yesterday we heard from Shila Prabhupada the story of each soul
in this material world including our stories and how we have lost our Satchitananda consciousness,
joy,
joyful Satchitananda consciousness and how we can again recover our joyful Satchitananda
consciousness, not mere Satchitananda consciousness but Satchitananda Krishna consciousness of
love of Krishna can be achieved by the living entities in this material world.
If they take shelter of a pure devotee of the Lord who delivers us the Hari Nama, the Nama
incarnation, sound incarnation of Krishna through whose association they can revive our consciousness,
revive our original,
position as the loving servant of the Lord has been part and parcel of the
supreme whole. Our small Satchidananda consciousness has to serve the supreme
Satchidananda consciousness. Then our small Satchidananda consciousness is
nourished. This is the whole essence of the module 35 part 3. Those who are not
ready please read it. It gives you a lot of hope by
knowing your potential to become blissful Krishna conscious entities
beyond this material body.
